description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle and a large, solid metal head. The handle is light brown with visible wood grain, ergonomically shaped for a comfortable grip, and tapers slightly toward the end. The axe head is made of gray metal, with a broad, flat poll on one side and a sharp, wedge-shaped cutting edge on the other. The blade is thick and sturdy, suitable for chopping wood or similar tasks, and is securely mounted onto the handle. There are no visible decorative elements, engravings, or branding on either the handle or the blade. The overall design is utilitarian, emphasizing durability and functionality for use in urban or outdoor environments.
description: A sturdy hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a thick, gray metal head featuring a sharp cutting edge. The design is practical and robust, with no visible markings or decorations.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the top, showing the pointed blade edge and the narrow width of the handle.
description_view_1: The axe is viewed from the side, highlighting the full profile of the metal head and the curvature of the wooden handle.
description_view_2: The axe is seen from the bottom, displaying the flat poll of the head and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_3: The opposite side view of the axe, again showing the blade profile and the ergonomic handle shape.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with visible grain, ergonomic grip, oval cross-section, and a natural finish.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wedge-shaped steel blade with a broad poll and no beard; functional and undecorated.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted onto the handle.
